name: Baicalin
effects: No direct effects data. Contextual inference: Used by native american tribes for anxiety and insomnia... No direct mechanismofaction data. Contextual inference: Used by native american tribes for anxiety and insomnia... Used by Native American tribes for anxiety and insomnia.. Used by Native American tribes for anxiety and insomnia.
description: Baicalin appears in records as a compound reported in nan and scutellaria lateriflora. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
summary: Baicalin appears in records as a compound reported in nan and scutellaria lateriflora. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
mechanism: American skullcap flavonoids are associated with anticonvulsant and anxiolytic activity; GABAergic signaling and broader neuroinhibitory effects have been proposed in preclinical work.
